three.module.js:3991 Uncaught TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'x')
    at Vector3.copy (three.module.js:3991:14)
    at Track.generateScenery (track.js:145:23)
    at Track.generate (track.js:88:14)
    at new Track (track.js:13:14)

    at init (game.js:50:5)
    at game.js:180:1
analysis:
- Issue identified: `this.points` is undefined when accessed in `generateScenery()` at line 145. The `generateScenery()` method is called at line 88 in `generate()`, but `this.points` is only initialized at line 91 (after `generateScenery()` is called). This causes the error when trying to access `this.points[0]`.

- Files affected: track.js

- Changes needed: Move the `this.generateScenery()` call to after the line where `this.points = this.curve.getSpacedPoints(200)` is set, so that `this.points` is available when `generateScenery()` needs it.
